title: Radon - Canada.ca
content:
Learn about what radon is, where it comes from, and how you can protect your health.
Learn about radon and how it gets in your home.
How to purchase a test kit or hire a professional to test your home.

### Reducing levels in your home
Techniques for reducing radon levels.
Guides to help municipalities, provinces and territories address radon.
Guides, reports, studies, videos, fact sheets and infographics.

### Technical information
Resources for health professionals, real estate professionals, and measurement and mitigation professionals.
